sent_simp: 手机支付让购物变得更加便捷。
sent_trad: 手機支付讓購物變得更加便捷。
pinyin: Shǒujī zhīfù ràng gòuwù biàn de gèngjiā biànjié.
english: Mobile payment has made shopping much more convenient and fast.

pinyin: Yī liàng zhuāngjiǎchē tíng zài lùkǒu.
english: An armored vehicle was parked at the intersection.

sent_simp: 飞机顺利着陆，旅客鼓掌欢呼。
sent_trad: 飛機順利著陸，旅客鼓掌歡呼。
pinyin: Fēijī shùnlì zhuólù, lǚkè gǔzhǎng huānhū.
english: The plane landed smoothly and the passengers applauded and cheered.

sent_simp: 洪水过后，农田连片受损，损失惨重。
sent_trad: 洪水過後，農田連片受損，損失慘重。
pinyin: Hóngshuǐ guòhòu, nóngtián liánpiàn shòusǔn, sǔnshī cǎnzhòng.
english: After the flood, farmland was damaged across a continuous stretch, resulting in heavy losses.

sent_simp: 越来越多的人喜欢生态旅游，去大自然放松。
sent_trad: 越來越多的人喜歡生態旅遊，去大自然放鬆。
pinyin: Yuèláiyuè duō de rén xǐhuan shēngtài lǚyóu, qù dàzìrán fàngsōng.
english: More and more people enjoy ecotourism to relax in nature.
